sourceFiles: Mooncake POD Support Notebook/POD/VMSCIM/4. Services/AKS/###Feature Landing Status###.md

unsupportedFeatures.detail: Marked 'NA' in Feature Landing Status. AAD pod-managed identities are not available in Azure China. Use Workload Identity instead.

unsupportedFeatures.feature: Microsoft Defender for cloud-native security agent for AKS (Defender for Containers)
unsupportedFeatures.detail: AzureDefenderFeatureFlagNotEnabled error: 'AzureDefender installation is not allowed since feature Microsoft.ContainerService/AKS-AzureDefender is not enabled'. Defender Security profile addon is not supported in 21V.
unsupportedFeatures.replacement: Azure Policy addon can be used as partial workaround

unsupportedFeatures.detail: Explicit 'Feature Gap' for Mooncake noted in PG sync 2025/11/13. Fleet Manager for multi-cluster management is not available in Azure China.
Customer asked for ETA in Mooncake in 2024/09, no landing date confirmed. Azure Container Storage (ACSTOR) is not available in Azure China.
unsupportedFeatures.replacement: Azure Disk CSI, Azure File CSI, Azure Blob CSI drivers are available

unsupportedFeatures.detail: Marked 'NA' in Feature Landing Status. The legacy in-tree CCM is deprecated. Out-of-tree Cloud Controller Manager is verified and supported.
unsupportedFeatures.replacement: Out-of-tree Cloud Controller Manager (verified in Mooncake)

partialFeatures.feature: API Server VNet Integration (private API server via subnet delegation)
partialFeatures.detail: Status: 'Pending on Net feature in Mooncake'. Not yet GA in Azure China as of the last Feature Landing Status update. TSG shared by Icy.
Listed in Feature Landing Status with empty GA date — no Mooncake landing confirmation. Global feature, Mooncake availability unknown.

partialFeatures.feature: KMS (Key Management Service for etcd secret encryption)
partialFeatures.detail: Was in public preview globally ~03/31/2023. No Mooncake landing date confirmed in notes.
Listed in Feature Landing Status with empty GA date. Mooncake availability unclear. Private cluster V1 is verified.
PreGA in Mooncake as of mid-2023 (Icy verified). Full GA status in 21V not confirmed.
PreGA in Mooncake (Icy verified). Cluster auto-upgrade channel configuration may not be fully GA in 21V.

partialFeatures.feature: Customize node configuration for AKS node pools
partialFeatures.detail: PreGA in Mooncake, partially verified. Not all kubelet/OS parameters may be supported.

New node pool type (non-VMSS) available in global. In Mooncake there was a bug noted (2026/3). Key limitations: Cluster Autoscaler not supported, Node pool snapshot not supported, max 5 VM sizes per pool (same family only).
limitations: Cluster Autoscaler is not supported with VMs node pools
Node pool snapshot is not supported
Max 5 VM sizes per node pool, must be same VM family

notes: MCR image pull endpoint changed from mcr.azk8s.cn to mcr.azure.cn
OIDC issuer cannot be disabled once enabled on a cluster
